# CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.stopped

**Case**

The display stream was stopped.

## Declaration

```swift
case stopped
```

## Constants

- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameComplete**: A new frame was generated.
- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameIdle**: A new frame was not generated because the display did not change.
- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameBlank**: A new frame was not generated because the display has gone blank.

items.description: A new frame was not generated because the display did not change.
